properties.name: ai.semantic.schema.enabled
properties.description: Whether AI Semantic Schema auto-configuration is enabled. When disabled, no HibernateSchemaAIExtractor or AISemanticContextProvider beans are created.

properties.name: ai.semantic.schema.exclude-entity-relational-fields
properties.description: Whether to exclude relational fields (associations) from entity attributes. Relationships are still exposed at the entity level of the semantic context regardless of this setting.
